mnemonics.title: Probability is a PIE (Probability, Independence, E
mnemonics.content: The key ingredients to understand before baking your distribution cake.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: A sample space is the set of all possible outcomes of an experiment.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: A random variable is a function that assigns a numerical value to each outcome in a sample space.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: A probability distribution describes how probabilities are distributed over the values of the random variable.
